description: A referendum held on April 16, 2017, in Turkey regarding the transition from a parliamentary system to an executive presidency. The 'Yes' side (pro-reform) won with 51.4% against 48.6%.

key_events.description: Government begins intense campaigning in state-controlled media.
Diplomatic row with European nations impacts diaspora voters.
High-profile rallies push undecided voters toward the status quo or change.
Final count reveals a deeply divided electorate after contested vote counting procedures.

calibration_notes: Demonstrates the role of state media and undecided voter consolidation in an autocratic-leaning political environment.
